# convertPoint(toImagePoint:)

**Instance Method**

Converts an image view coordinate to an image coordinate.

## Declaration

```swift
func convertPoint(toImagePoint viewPoint: NSPoint) -> NSPoint
```

## Parameters

- **viewPoint**: A point specified in coordinates relative to the image view.

## Return Value

The point specified in coordinates relative to the image.

## Converting Points and Rectangles

- **convertRect(toImageRect:)**: Converts an image view rectangle to an image rectangle.
- **convertImagePoint(toViewPoint:)**: Converts an image coordinate to an image view coordinate.
- **convertImageRect(toViewRect:)**: Converts an image rectangle to an image view rectangle.
